const RichContent = () => <Markdown
    content={`# Task Report

## Summary
The deployment was **successful** with *zero downtime*.

### Key Points
- All services are running
- Database migrations completed
- Cache warmed up

> Note: Monitor for the next 24 hours.

\`\`\`bash
curl -s https://api.example.com/health
# {"status": "ok"}
\`\`\`
`} />;

explorer-renameinput.description: Inline name editing component. - Auto-focuses and selects text on mount - Only edits the name portion (extension shown as read-only) - Enter saves, Escape cancels, blur cancels (macOS Finder behavior)

reactDocgen.description:
Inline name editing component.

- Auto-focuses and selects text on mount
- Only edits the name portion (extension shown as read-only)
- Enter saves, Escape cancels, blur cancels (macOS Finder behavior)

extension.description: File extension (e.g. "txt"). If provided, shown as read-only suffix

onSave.description: Called with the full new name (including extension) on save

onCancel.description: Called when rename is cancelled (Escape or blur)

);

stories.name: Top
stories.snippet:
const Top = () => <Tooltip label="Tooltip text" position="top">
    <button
        className="px-4 py-2 bg-app-box border border-app-line rounded-md text-ink text-sm">Top tooltip
              </button>
</Tooltip>;

stories.name: With Keybinds
stories.snippet:
const WithKeybinds = () => <Tooltip label="Save file" position="bottom" keybinds={['⌘', 'S']}>
    <button
        className="px-4 py-2 bg-app-box border border-app-line rounded-md text-ink text-sm">Save
              </button>
</Tooltip>;
